title: Dependency Satisfied Event
description: Emitted when a previously-filed dep_filed is resolved — the awaited artifact landed (PR merged, version bumped, ratification decided). The Orchestrator removes the dep from its open-dependency graph on reduction. May be emitted by the satisfying agent OR by the originally-blocked agent confirming receipt.

dep_id.description: Must match a prior dep_filed event's dep_id

satisfied_by.description: Agent ID / source that delivered the artifact

satisfying_event_id.description: Optional event_id of the pr_merged / canonical_version_bumped / ratification_decision that satisfied the dep

satisfying_artifact.description: Path / version / PR reference of the delivered artifact
